patch_history.raw: Ruse Fixed a bug where post-death Ruse could not be unequipped without casting it. v
Ruse Smoke duration 14s >> 6s when casted while dead Meddle Area of effect reduced 6m >> 4m v
Pick-me-up Fixed a bug where their total health pool was displaying 151 instead of 150 when overhealed Meddle Fixed an issue where throw animations would break if aiming straight down v

Not Dead Yet Fixed a bug where killing Clove right after they use it would cause some finishers to have erratic behavior Fixed a bug where Clove’s agent icon in the top team composition bar would not update properly when Clove was killed inside of a smoke after using it Fixed a bug where Clove would revive in spawn if their body had too many players standing over it Pick-me-up Fixed a bug where the overheal UI effects would persist on the HUD even after the overheal had been reduced to 0 v

Fixed a bug that incorrectly teleported Clove to spawn when teleporting back from Iso's Kill Contract Fixed a bug where Clove would be moved into a wall if their body was intersecting Sage’s Barrier Orb Ruse Charges are now restricted to 1 maximum when Clove is dead Pick-me-up Overheal reduced from 100 HP >>> 50 HP Not Dead Yet Fixed a bug where Clove would sometimes revive in unexpected locations v

patch_history.raw: Pick-me-up Fixed an issue where the cast sound was silent for enemies. v
Pick-me-up Visuals updated to show when Clove’s speed boost is active v
Pick-me-up Fixed an issue where the audio wouldn’t play properly for all players. v

Ruse Fixed an issue where Clove’s Ruse battlefield view could be seen from underneath elevated locations while they have it equipped. Pick-me-up Fixed an issue where Clove’s Pick-me-up duration was incorrect for observer/spectator clients. v
Meddle Updated tooltips to reflect patch changes. v
Not Dead Yet Fixed a bug where Clove could take damage or die for a single frame upon reviving v

Meddle No longer explodes after a 1.3 second timer after casting. Explodes after contact with the ground after a 0.75s timer. Projectile audio has been updated Ruse Cooldown duration increased from 30s >>> 40s Pick-me-up Health buff duration increased from 8s >>> 10s Move speed duration reduced from 8s >>> 3s v

patch_history.raw: Pick-me-up Fixed issues where Clove could tank lethal damage specifically when Regen Shield and Pick-me-up were active at the same time. v
Not Dead Yet Fixed an issue where Not Dead Yet could fail to cast when pressed in the last few frames of the activation window v

Ruse Enemy smokes updated to appear more red than ally smokes Visual cues have been added to the inside of the smoke before it expires. Not Dead Yet (changed in ) Time to get a kill: 12s >>> 10s Meddle Fixed a bug where Meddle was hitting through level geometry. v

patch_history.raw: Not Dead Yet Fixed an issue regarding resurrection not being visible for Spectators and Observers. v

Pick-me-up Cost 100 >>> 200 Duration 10s >>> 8s Damaging Assist Time to activate 10s >>> 6s Fixed an issue where Clove’s Pick-me-up could not proc on training range bots Ruse Fixed an issue where players inside Clove’s smoke forming location were at a disadvantage compared to players on the outside of the smoke. Not Dead Yet Cost 7 >>> 8 Unequip Delay .7 >>> .8s Fixed an issue where it allowed smoke assists to allow them to survive Fixed issues where Clove could play the incorrect animation or slide along the ground during a skin finisher if they were the last player alive and had their ultimate available. v

patch_history.raw: Pick-me-up Fixed issues where the timer for Pick-me-up could be restarted which would allow Clove to have more time than intended to activate the ability. v
Ruse Fixed Clove's icons being incorrect when Ruse was equipped. v

Speculative fix for an issue where Clove’s corpse would sometimes remain upright after dying. Fixed a bug where dead allies or observers spectating Clove would skip the death camera ceremony upon Clove’s death. Pick-me-up Speculative fix for Pick-me-up HUD sometimes showing > 150 total health values when taking fall damage as Clove activated the ability. Fixed a bug where damage to Pick-me-up temporary health did not appear in Combat Report. Meddle Fixed a bug where Meddle used an incorrect ability icon in the combat report. Fixed a bug where Meddle could rarely cause a client-side hitch. Ruse Fixed a bug where Ruse used after death does not report to the Match Details. Fixed a bug where Clove’s head and arm hitboxes could be offset when aiming sharply up or down, and while crouched with R
Added PC-only[] v

Ruse Fixed a bug for Coaches and Observers where Agents with an ability map UI would repeatedly play their equip animation when switching to their POV. Team Deathmatch only: Pick-me-up Fixed a bug where the overheal would sometimes not give health when they died previously with the buff active. Console-only[] v
Ruse Added Agent-specific cursor curve settings for map ability controls.
